title: MCLN_FSMA_EX108_Configuration Guide
fullText:
center 83548 center 290830 EX 108 – RF Base Picking FSMA Enhancements Configuration Guide 0 0 EX 108 – RF Base Picking FSMA Enhancements Configuration Guide Table of Contents TOC \o "1-3" \h \z \u 1. Create EX108 Enablement System Code PAGEREF _Toc190792202 \h 3 2. Create Transaction Parameter & Configure Transaction – Pck Cubed Directed PAGEREF _Toc190792203 \h 5 3. Create Transaction Parameter & Configure Transaction – Pick to Tote PAGEREF _Toc190792204 \h 8 4. Configure Item Warehouse parameter for FSMA (Lot-tracked) items PAGEREF _Toc190792205 \h 11 5. Post Configuration Instructions   PAGEREF _Toc190792206 \h 12 6. Questions and Answers  PAGEREF _Toc190792207 \h 13 Create EX 108 Enablement System Code Navigate to System Code UI Filter for Code Type 000 Select the Custom Code 000 record Click Code IDs on the bottom right-hand corner Select any Extension Control code ID and hit the Copy button Fill in the following details for the EX 108 Code ID . Click Save when finished. Navigate to the Parameters tab and ensure that the Enablement Flag is turned on. If not enabled, enable it and click Save . Create Transaction Parameter & Confi gure Transaction – Pck Cubed Directed Navigate to Transactions U I and search for Pck Cubed* Select Pck CubedD-LblPik and click Program Template to add a parameter . Select the ‘Add’ button to add a new transaction parameter Configure the parameter as shown below and hit the Save button . Back out to your transaction search results, select the Pck CubedD-LblPik transaction again, and hit the Edit button. Select the Parameters tab and configure the following parameters: Set parameter 4-4 Active Verification Mode equal to ‘Scan item enter quantity’ and hit Save Navigate to the last page of Pck CubedD-LblPik transaction parameters Disable parameter s 502-502 EX12 Enabled ? and 507-507 EX12 Task Level Printing Assumption 11 – ‘ EX12 is not enabled at the same time as EX108.’ Enable parameter 599-599 EX108 FSMA RF Picking Click Save after configuring Create Transaction Parameter & Configure Transaction – Pick to Tote In the Transactions U I , search for P ick to Tote* Select Pick to Tote Singles and click Program Template to add a parameter. Select the ‘Add’ button to add a new transaction parameter Configure the parameter as shown below and hit the Save button . Back out to your transaction search results, select the P ick to Tote Singles transaction again, and hit the Edit button. Select the Parameters tab and configure the following parameters: Set parameter 1 - 1 Item Verification Mode equal to ‘ Verify pick by scanning item and qty ’ Enable parameter 100-100 EX108 FSMA RF Picking Click Save after configuring C onfigure Item Warehouse parameter for FSMA (Lot-tracked) items For Lot-tracked (FSMA) items, navigate to the Items UI and search using your item name Select the record and hit V iew Select the Warehouse tab and hit the Edit button Configure Inventory Tracking fields as below and hit Save . Post Configuration Instructions        Once the configuration has been entered, the following actions need to be taken before the configuration is active:      System Action    Required?    No Action Needed   No   Environment Cache Clear   Yes   Environment Restart   No   App Server Restart   No      To clear the cache – go to the Cache Administration UI, and click the Clear All button.   Questions and Answers       This below table is used to track questions that were asked and answered regarding this enhancement. If the question resulted in any action it is listed against the question.   #    Asked By    Question    Answered By    Answer    Date Added    Action Taken

[Document: MCLN_FSMA_EX108_Configuration Guide]

center 83548 center 290830 EX 108 – RF Base Picking FSMA Enhancements Configuration Guide 0 0 EX 108 – RF Base Picking FSMA Enhancements Configuration Guide Table of Contents  1. Create EX108 Enablement System Code  2. Create Transaction Parameter & Configure Transaction – Pck Cubed Directed  3. Create Transaction Parameter & Configure Transaction – Pick to Tote  4. Configure Item Warehouse parameter for FSMA (Lot-tracked) items  5. Post Configuration Instructions    6. Questions and Answers   Create EX 108 Enablement System Code Navigate to System Code UI Filter for Code Type 000 Select the Custom Code 000 record Click Code IDs on the bottom right-hand corner Select any Extension Control code ID and hit the Copy button Fill in the following details for the EX 108 Code ID . Click Save when finished. Navigate to the Parameters tab and ensure that the Enablement Flag is turned on. If not enabled, enable it and click Save . Create Transaction Parameter & Confi gure Transaction – Pck Cubed Directed Navigate to Transactions U I and search for Pck Cubed* Select Pck CubedD-LblPik and click Program Template to add a parameter . Select the ‘Add’ button to add a new transaction parameter Configure the parameter as shown below and hit the Save button . Back out to your transaction search results, select the Pck CubedD-LblPik transaction again, and hit the Edit button. Select the Parameters tab and configure the following parameters: Set parameter 4-4 Active Verification Mode equal to ‘Scan item enter quantity’ and hit Save Navigate to the last page of Pck CubedD-LblPik transaction parameters Disable parameter s 502-502 EX12 Enabled ? and 507-507 EX12 Task Level Printing Assumption 11 – ‘ EX12 is not enabled at the same time as EX108.’ Enable parameter 599-599 EX108 FSMA RF Picking Click Save after configuring Create Transaction Parameter & Configure Transaction – Pick to Tote In the Transactions U I , search for P ick to Tote* Select Pick to Tote Singles and click Program Template to add a parameter. Select the ‘Add’ button to add a new transaction parameter Configure the parameter as shown below and hit the Save button . Back out to your transaction search results, select the P ick to Tote Singles transaction again, and hit the Edit button.

ngles and click Program Template to add a parameter. Select the ‘Add’ button to add a new transaction parameter Configure the parameter as shown below and hit the Save button . Back out to your transaction search results, select the P ick to Tote Singles transaction again, and hit the Edit button.

Select the Parameters tab and configure the following parameters: Set parameter 1 - 1 Item Verification Mode equal to ‘ Verify pick by scanning item and qty ’ Enable parameter 100-100 EX108 FSMA RF Picking Click Save after configuring C onfigure Item Warehouse parameter for FSMA (Lot-tracked) items For Lot-tracked (FSMA) items, navigate to the Items UI and search using your item name Select the record and hit V iew Select the Warehouse tab and hit the Edit button Configure Inventory Tracking fields as below and hit Save . Post Configuration Instructions        Once the configuration has been entered, the following actions need to be taken before the configuration is active:      System Action    Required?    No Action Needed   No   Environment Cache Clear   Yes   Environment Restart   No   App Server Restart   No      To clear the cache – go to the Cache Administration UI, and click the Clear All button.   Questions and Answers       This below table is used to track questions that were asked and answered regarding this enhancement. If the question resulted in any action it is listed against the question.   #    Asked By    Question    Answered By    Answer    Date Added    Action Taken
